highlights.title: Celebrations Made Easy
highlights.description: Cake orders, themed setups, and package options can be showcased and updated from the admin editor.

highlights.title: Offers That Convert

highlights.title: Built-In QR Shortcuts
highlights.description: Publish QR links for menu, WhatsApp, directions, reviews, and payments in one place.

hero.title: Promotions, bundles, and seasonal highlights.

intro.heading: Current Promotions
intro.body: Use this page to promote time-limited discounts, celebration bundles, or featured menu items. Every card is editable and image-ready from the admin panel.
